summary: Story 19-3 approved. AC #1 fully implemented: useNavigate added, handleCreateTicket redirects to /reception/tickets/{id} after successful creation, error handling preserved. Test co-located covers the redirect assertion with mock navigate. Route coherence verified against App.tsx and existing ticket links. No HIGH or MEDIUM issues. 3 LOW findings (informational only): setLoading after navigate is harmless in React 18+, no error-path test (pre-existing pattern, out of scope), manual terrain test pending.
